text.title: QA Performance Run Verdict Template Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure applying the qa-perf-run-verdict-template methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: collect-results
step.action: Pull k6/locust JSON; compute p50/p95/p99/error_rate per endpoint.

step.name: apply-slos
step.action: For each endpoint compute pass/fail vs slo target.

step.name: decide-verdict
step.action: PASS if all endpoints pass + no >10% p95 regression; FAIL on any miss; INCONCLUSIVE on sample shortage.

step.name: commit-report
step.action: Write JSON + Markdown summary to release docs; attach to release ticket.
